headcount_quote: As of December 31, 2025, our employee headcount worldwide was 134,785.
research_notes: Most recent 10-K: FY2025 (December 31, 2025), filed January 29, 2026, accession 0001628280-26-003952. FY2024 comparison: 125,665. Human Capital Resources section covers total headcount, equity participation (92% of employees receive equity), career development programs (Manufacturing Development Program, Engineering Development Program), and limited U.S. demographics (2.2% veterans, 3.5% individuals with disabilities). No breakdown by function (manufacturing, engineering, sales/service, R&D, admin) is disclosed in either FY2024 or FY2025 10-K. Third-party role estimates derived from LinkedIn data (not from SEC filings) excluded per real-filings-only policy.
